actresses_dmm_id_invalid: DMM ID must be greater than or equal to 0
actresses_editing_existing: You are editing an existing actress record.
actresses_fill_new: Fill in details to add a new actress record.
actresses_merge_select_at_least_two: Select at least two actresses from the current page to merge.
actresses_name_required: Either First Name or Japanese Name is required
actresses_no_conflicts: No field conflicts. Safe to merge with defaults.
actresses_search_placeholder: Search by English or Japanese name
actresses_select_at_least_two: Select at least 2 actresses to merge
actresses_subtitle: Create, update, and remove actress records stored in the database.
auth_login_required_desc: Sign in with your configured username and password.
auth_remember_me_desc: Keep this browser signed in across browser and server restarts for the normal session lifetime.
auth_service_unavailable_desc: The app could not reach the authentication endpoint. Check server status and retry.
browse_added_files_folders: Added {fileCount} JAV files from {folderCount} folders ({failed} failed)
browse_dest_in_place_note: Destination matches source path with no folder format — files will be renamed in place only.
browse_dest_organize_note: Scraped files will be organized with metadata, artwork, and NFO files in this directory
browse_file_operations_desc: Choose how files are organized during scraping
browse_force_refresh_desc: Clear cache and fetch fresh metadata
browse_get_cwd_failed: Failed to get current working directory
browse_howto_1: 1. Select operation mode: Scrape & Organize (choose move/copy/hard link/soft link during review) or Update Metadata (files stay in place)
browse_howto_2: 2. Navigate to your video files using the file browser (type a path or click folders)
browse_howto_3: 3. Click Scan to find JAV files (enable Recursive to include subfolders)
browse_howto_4: 4. Configure options (force refresh, scraper selection) in the bottom bar as needed
browse_howto_5: 5. Click the action button to start the operation
browse_in_place_implied_notice: Output destination matches source path with no folder/subfolder format — Organize and Reorganize in place are unavailable.
browse_manual_scrape_desc: Review & override IDs/URLs per file before scraping
browse_merge_strategy_desc: Choose how to merge existing NFO data with freshly scraped data
browse_mode_scrape_desc: Scrape metadata and organize files into destination folder with artwork and NFO
browse_mode_update_desc: Update metadata and media files in place, video files remain where they are
browse_no_files_filter_match: No JAV files match current filter ({count} found in folder)
browse_no_files_folders: No JAV files found in selected folders
browse_no_files_no_filter_subfolder: No JAV files found in any subfolder
browse_no_files_recursive: No JAV files found matching "{filter}" in any subfolder
browse_op_reorganize_desc: Keep location, rename folder and file
browse_overriding_settings: Overriding settings for this batch only.
browse_subtitle: Select video files and scrape metadata from configured sources
browse_tip_filter: Tip: Use the filter box to narrow down files, then scan to select only matching results.
common_path_outside_allowed: This path is outside your allowed directories. Add it in Settings → Security.
common_select_folder_desc: Navigate to and select the folder where files will be organized
editor_alias_hint: {count} known names for this performer. Selected name is written to the NFO <name> tag.
editor_alias_title: This actress has multiple known names; pick the one to write to the NFO
editor_dir_already_list: Directory already in the allowed list
editor_dir_default_badge_tooltip: The first allowed directory is used as the default scan path
editor_dir_dot_tooltip: "." means the current working directory (where the app was launched from). Add an absolute path like /Users/you/Videos for a stable, explicit location.
editor_dir_empty_hint: No allowed directories configured. Add one below to enable scanning.
editor_dir_hint: Press Enter to add the typed path. Use ↑↓ to pick a suggestion.
editor_dir_select_desc: Navigate to and choose a folder to allow
editor_search_hint: Type to search actresses or enter details manually below
editor_validation_body: At least first name or Japanese name is required
genres_add_rule_heading: Add a new genre replacement rule
genres_both_fields_required: Both original and replacement fields are required
genres_bulk_ph: Paste genres separated by commas or new lines...
genres_enter_genres_to_add: Enter one or more genres to add
genres_favorites_desc: Save a curated set of favorite genres here for later use. Favorites are a saved list you can reference when organizing your collection.
genres_favorites_empty: No favorites yet. Add one below or paste several at once.
genres_ignored_desc: Genres in this list are excluded from scraping/processing. Takes effect on the next scrape.
genres_ignored_empty: No ignored genres. Add one below.
genres_next_scrape_note: Replacements take effect on the next scrape. Existing movies are not retroactively updated.
genres_none_configured: No genre replacements configured yet. Add one above.
genres_subtitle: Manage ignored genres, favorites, and genre name replacements
home_check_ws_skipped: Real-time stream unavailable in desktop app
home_subtitle: Run scraping workflows, monitor system health, and jump back into recent jobs.
jobs_clear_all_tooltip: Clear all completed, failed, cancelled jobs
jobs_clear_confirm_desc: Clear all non-running jobs? This will remove {count} job(s).
jobs_clear_failed: Failed to clear {count} job(s). Some jobs may still be removed.
jobs_desc: Manage your batch jobs and organize history

match.deletedPlural=one: Deleted {deleted} history record older than {days} days
match.deletedPlural=*: Deleted {deleted} history records older than {days} days

jobs_no_operations: No operations recorded for this job
jobs_valid_days: Please enter a valid number of days
logs_empty_hint: Events will appear here as the application runs.
manual_badge_auto_title: Auto — ID derived from the filename via the matcher
manual_badge_id_title: Manual ID override — scrapes as this ID, bypassing the matcher
manual_badge_url_title: Manual URL override — scrapes with URL-compatible scrapers only
manual_desc: Review each file and override its ID or URL before scraping.
manual_input_placeholder: Auto — type ID or URL to override
manual_no_files: No files left in this batch. Go back to browse to select again.
manual_scraper_order_desc: Select and reorder the scrapers for this scrape. The results will be aggregated according to this order.
manual_scrapers_edit_title: Click to change scraper selection and order
movie_genre_add_first_ph: Type a genre and press Enter
nfo_no_differences_desc: NFO data and scraped data are identical
nfo_no_stats_desc: Merge statistics will be available after merging
nfo_stats_summary: {fromScraper} fields from scraper, {fromNfo} from NFO, {conflicts} conflicts resolved
path_input_no_allowed_dirs: No allowed directories configured — add one in Settings → Security.
priority_add_all_aria: Add all scrapers to this field
priority_all_disabled: All scrapers disabled — field will be empty
priority_empty_field_hint: No scrapers in this field's list. Save with an empty list to suppress this field (stores the "__skip__" sentinel — no scraper is consulted), or add some below.
priority_field_title_desc: Movie title in English or romanized form
priority_help_advanced: Advanced — set a custom scraper order for individual fields.
priority_help_note: Per-field lists are exclusive: only the listed scrapers are consulted — there is no fallback to the global list.
priority_help_simple: Simple — one priority list applies to every metadata field.
priority_info_leave_empty: To leave a field empty, remove all scrapers and Save (stores {skipExample} — the skip sentinel, no scraper is consulted), or point it at a scraper that doesn't provide it (e.g. {tokyohotExample}). A legacy {emptyExample} is treated as inherit-global, not suppression — so "Remove all + Save" stores the {skipSentinel} sentinel instead.
priority_info_scrapers_top_to_bottom: Scrapers are tried top-to-bottom; the first one that returns data for this field is used. Only the scrapers listed here are consulted — there is no fallback to the global list. Remove a scraper with its {icon} button; add one back from the chips above.
priority_mode_advanced_desc: Advanced: Customize priority for individual fields
priority_mode_simple_desc: Simple: One priority list applies to all metadata fields
priority_no_overrides_hint: All fields use the global priority
priority_remove_all_aria: Remove all scrapers from this field
priority_switch_simple_body: You have {count} field override(s). Switching to Simple mode will hide these settings but not delete them. Continue?
revert_batch_body: This will move {files} back to their original locations and delete generated NFOs, posters, and fanart. This action cannot be undone.
revert_consequence_artwork: Downloaded posters and fanart will be deleted
revert_consequence_files: Files will be moved back to their original paths
revert_operation_body: Move {fileName} back to its original location and delete generated artifacts?
review_auto_switched_organize: Auto-switched from Organize: destination matches source path with no folder/subfolder format.
review_files_organized_in_dir: Files will be organized with metadata, artwork, and NFO files in this directory
review_files_stay_in_place: {label} — files stay in their current location.
review_force_overwrite_desc: Ignore existing NFO, use only scraper data
review_nfo_merge_strategy_desc: Choose how to merge existing NFO data with freshly scraped data. Leave empty to replace all data.
review_no_failed: No failed files. Everything was identified successfully.
review_no_scraper_results_desc: Raw results are retained for the review window. Re-scrape to repopulate, or they'll synthesize from the cached movie on next view.
review_no_source_for_field: No source provided a value for this field.
review_op_copy_desc: Copy creates independent destination files and keeps originals unchanged.
review_op_hardlink_desc: Hard links require source and destination on the same filesystem.
review_op_move_desc: Move relocates source files into the organized destination.
review_op_softlink_desc: Soft links point to the original file path. Windows may require Developer Mode or elevated privileges.
review_poster_crop_drag_hint: Drag the fixed crop box to choose the area to keep.
review_poster_from_screenshot_failed: Failed to set poster from screenshot: {error}
review_preserve_nfo_desc: Never overwrite NFO fields, only add missing
review_redirecting_browse: Redirecting to browse page in a few seconds...
review_save_changes_title: Save pending edits to the database
review_search_input_hint: Enter a DVD ID (e.g., IPX-123), content ID (e.g., ipx00535), or a direct URL from DMM or R18.dev
review_search_input_label: DVD ID, Content ID, or Direct URL
review_select_at_least_one_scraper: Please select at least one scraper
review_select_scrapers_aggregate: Select which scrapers to use. The results will be aggregated according to your configured priorities.
review_select_scrapers_fresh: Select which scrapers to use for fetching fresh metadata. The results will be aggregated according to your configured priorities.
review_set_as_cover_confirm: Use this screenshot as the cover/fanart? This will replace the current cover image.
review_set_as_poster_confirm: Use this screenshot as the poster? This will replace the current poster image.
review_set_destination_for_preview: Set a destination path to see the organization preview.
review_skip_download_desc: Don't download cover, poster, and screenshots
review_skip_media_download_desc: Don't download cover, poster, and screenshots
review_source_resolver_subtitle: Pick which scraper's value wins for each field
review_subtitle_organize: Review and edit scraped metadata before organizing files
review_subtitle_update: Metadata and media files have been updated in place. Review and edit as needed.
review_unable_to_open_rescrape: Unable to open rescrape: movie not found
scraper_none_available: No scrapers available. Please enable scrapers in settings.
scraper_priority_order_hint: Priority Order (drag to reorder, higher = more priority)
screenshot_add_placeholder: Enter screenshot URL and press Enter or click Add
screenshot_filter_disclaimer: Placeholder images are automatically filtered during scraping via hash match or file size threshold.
screenshot_use_cover_body: Use this screenshot as the cover/fanart? This will replace the current cover image.
screenshot_use_poster_body: Use this screenshot as the poster? This will replace the current poster image.
settings_api_token_regenerate_confirm_de: Regenerating the token "{name}" will invalidate the current value. Make sure you no longer need it. Continue?
settings_api_token_revoke_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to revoke the token "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
settings_api_tokens_desc: Manage API tokens for programmatic access to the Javinizer API
settings_api_tokens_empty: No API tokens configured. Create one below to enable programmatic access.
settings_api_tokens_prefix_note: Tokens use the jv_ prefix. The full token value is shown only once after creation.
settings_browser_binary_path_desc: Path to Chrome/Chromium executable. Leave empty for auto-discovery on macOS, Linux, or Windows.
settings_browser_block_css_desc: Block CSS loading (may break some sites)
settings_browser_block_images_desc: Block image loading for faster page loads
settings_browser_debug_visible_desc: Show browser window for debugging (overrides headless mode)
settings_browser_desc: Configure browser automation for scrapers that require JavaScript rendering. Browser must be enabled both globally here and per-scraper in Scraper Settings.
settings_browser_enable_desc: Master switch for browser automation. When disabled, all scrapers will use direct HTTP requests even if they have 'Use Browser' enabled.
settings_browser_headless_desc: Run browser without visible window (faster, uses less resources)
settings_browser_max_retries_desc: Retry attempts for failed browser operations
settings_browser_slow_mo_desc: Add delay between actions for debugging (0 = disabled)
settings_browser_stealth_desc: Enable anti-detection measures to avoid being blocked by websites
settings_browser_timeout_desc: Maximum time to wait for browser operations
settings_browser_user_agent_desc: Custom User-Agent string for browser (empty = use scraper's User-Agent)
settings_completeness_desc: Configure which metadata fields are essential, important, or nice-to-have for completeness scoring
settings_completeness_enable_desc: Enable custom field tier assignments and weights for completeness scoring. When disabled, default weights are used.
settings_database_actress_auto_add_desc: Automatically add new actresses to the database when encountered
settings_database_actress_convert_alias_: Use actress aliases from the database when generating metadata
settings_database_ignore_genres_desc: Comma-separated list of genres to exclude from metadata
settings_database_required_fields_desc: Comma-separated list of required metadata fields (scraping fails if missing)
settings_database_tag_enable_desc: Enable per-movie tag lookup from database
settings_database_type_desc: Database engine to use (SQLite recommended for most users)
settings_default_review_view_desc: Default view mode when opening the review page. Users can still switch views at runtime.
settings_file_matching_desc: Configure file scanning, extensions, and ID extraction patterns
settings_file_matching_exclude_desc: Glob patterns to exclude from scanning
settings_file_matching_extensions_desc: Comma-separated list of video file extensions to scan
settings_file_matching_min_size_desc: Ignore files smaller than this (0 = no minimum)
settings_file_matching_regex_desc: Custom regex pattern to extract movie IDs from filenames
settings_file_ops_allow_revert_desc: Enable the revert feature to undo organize operations and restore files to their original locations. When disabled, revert buttons are hidden and revert API calls are blocked.
settings_file_ops_desc: Control how Javinizer organizes and moves your files
settings_file_ops_mode_desc: Choose how files are organized during operations
settings_file_ops_mode_in_place_desc: Keep location, rename folder and file
settings_file_ops_mode_rename_desc: Rename video file, keep folder name
settings_file_ops_move_subtitles_desc: Automatically move subtitle files (.srt, .ass, etc.) with video files
settings_file_ops_no_folder_format: No folder naming template set — when destination matches source path, files will be renamed in place only.
settings_file_ops_rename_file_desc: Rename video files according to the file naming template
settings_file_ops_subtitle_ext_desc: Comma-separated list of subtitle file extensions to move with videos
settings_genre_replacement_auto_add_desc: Automatically add new genre replacements to the database with identity mapping
settings_genre_replacement_enable_desc: Normalize genre names using exact-match mappings from the database
settings_genre_replacements_add_new: Add a new genre replacement rule:
settings_genre_replacements_both_require: Both original and replacement fields are required
settings_genre_replacements_desc: Manage genre name replacements that are applied during scraping
settings_genre_replacements_empty: No genre replacements configured. Add one below.
settings_genre_replacements_inline_desc: Manage genre name replacements applied during scraping
settings_genre_replacements_note: Replacements take effect on the next scrape. Existing movies are not retroactively updated.
settings_language_desc: Interface language. "Automatic" uses your browser preference. Unsupported languages fall back to English.
settings_logging_desc: Configure logging level, format, and output destination
settings_logging_max_age_desc: Maximum age in days to keep log files (0 = no limit)
settings_logging_max_backups_desc: Number of old log files to keep (0 = unlimited)
settings_logging_max_size_desc: Maximum file size before rotation (0 = disabled)
settings_logging_output_desc: Use "stdout" for console, file path, or comma-separated (e.g., "stdout,data/logs/javinizer.log")
settings_logging_rotation_desc: Automatically rotate log files when they grow too large
settings_mediainfo_cli_path_desc: Path to the mediainfo binary (default: 'mediainfo' from PATH)
settings_mediainfo_desc: Configure MediaInfo CLI fallback for media file analysis
settings_mediainfo_enable_desc: Enable MediaInfo CLI fallback when library-based parsing fails
settings_mediainfo_timeout_desc: Maximum time to wait for MediaInfo CLI execution
settings_metadata_priority_desc: Configure which scraper to use for each metadata field
settings_nfo_actress_as_tag_desc: Include actress names in the <tag> field
settings_nfo_alt_name_role_desc: Use actress alternate names in <role> field
settings_nfo_desc: Configure NFO metadata file generation for Kodi/Plex compatibility
settings_nfo_display_title_desc: Template for the <title> field in NFO files
settings_nfo_enable_desc: Generate .nfo metadata files for use with media servers like Kodi and Plex
settings_nfo_fanart_desc: Include fanart/cover image reference in NFO
settings_nfo_first_name_order_desc: Use first-name-first order for actress names (Western style)
settings_nfo_generic_role_desc: Add 'Actress' as a generic role for all performers
settings_nfo_japanese_actress_desc: Use Japanese names for actresses in NFO files
settings_nfo_original_path_desc: Include the original file path in NFO metadata
settings_nfo_per_file_desc: Create separate NFO files for each video file (useful for multi-part movies)
settings_nfo_stream_details_desc: Include video/audio codec information from MediaInfo analysis
settings_nfo_tag_template_desc: Template for custom tags in NFO files
settings_nfo_tagline_template_desc: Template for the tagline field in NFO files
settings_nfo_trailer_desc: Include trailer video reference in NFO
settings_nfo_unknown_fallback_desc: Show placeholder text when no actress information is available (off = omit entirely)
settings_nfo_unknown_text_desc: Text to display when actress information is unavailable
settings_output_actress_folder_desc: Folder name for storing actress images
settings_output_actress_format_desc: Naming template for actress image files
settings_output_delimiter_desc: Character(s) used to separate multiple values (e.g., actresses, genres)
settings_output_desc: Configure output paths, templates, and download options
settings_output_download_timeout_desc: Maximum time to wait for image/video downloads to complete
settings_output_folder_template_none: No folder template — Organize mode will not create movie subfolders. When destination matches source, Rename file only mode is used automatically.
settings_output_group_actress_desc: Replace multiple actresses with a group folder name in templates (e.g., '@Group')
settings_output_group_actress_name_desc: Folder name used when a movie has multiple actresses (default: @Group)
settings_output_max_path_desc: Maximum total path length to prevent Windows path errors (MAX_PATH = 260)
settings_output_max_title_desc: Maximum characters for movie titles in folder names. Longer titles will be intelligently truncated.
settings_output_screenshot_folder_desc: Folder name for storing screenshot images
settings_output_subfolder_desc: Comma-separated list of subfolder names or templates
settings_page_config_warning_desc: The following metadata priority overrides point exclusively at disabled scrapers:
settings_page_desc: Configure Javinizer scraping and output options
settings_performance_buffer_size_desc: Channel buffer size for task communication
settings_performance_desc: Configure worker pool and performance tuning options
settings_performance_max_workers_desc: Higher values = faster but more resource intensive
settings_performance_update_interval_des: How often to update the UI (lower = more responsive but more CPU)
settings_proxy_default_profile_desc: Default global fallback profile. Scrapers in 'Inherit Global Proxy' mode use this profile.
settings_proxy_desc: Configure global proxy fallback, reusable proxy profiles, and FlareSolverr for Cloudflare bypass
settings_proxy_enable_desc: Enable global fallback proxy. Scrapers set to 'Inherit Global Proxy' will use this.
settings_proxy_fix_before_save: Fix proxy settings and test again before saving configuration.
settings_proxy_flaresolverr_enable_desc: Use FlareSolverr to bypass Cloudflare protection (required for JavLibrary). Run FlareSolverr via Docker: docker run -p 8191:8191 ghcr.io/flaresolverr/flaresolverr:latest
settings_proxy_flaresolverr_fix_before_s: Fix FlareSolverr settings and test again before saving configuration.
settings_proxy_flaresolverr_max_retries_: Number of retry attempts for failed FlareSolverr requests
settings_proxy_flaresolverr_session_ttl_: How long to keep FlareSolverr browser sessions alive
settings_proxy_flaresolverr_timeout_desc: Maximum time to wait for FlareSolverr to solve challenges
settings_proxy_global_note: Global proxy validation uses the default profile test. Run Test Profile on the current default profile.
settings_proxy_profile_url_required: Profile "{name}" needs a proxy URL before testing
settings_proxy_profiles_desc: Reusable proxy definitions that scrapers can reference by profile name.
settings_proxy_save_tooltip_expired: Test has expired, run test again
settings_proxy_save_tooltip_fix: Fix proxy settings and test again
settings_proxy_set_default_url: Set default proxy profile URL before testing
settings_r18dev_absent: No dump downloaded. The r18.dev scraper uses HTTP fallback (slower).
settings_r18dev_clear_confirm_desc: This will delete the local r18.dev dump database. The scraper will fall back to HTTP content_id resolution until you re-download it.
settings_r18dev_desc: Manage the local r18.dev database dump for offline content_id resolution
settings_r18dev_disabled_warn: Dump is downloaded but disabled — the scraper won't use it.
settings_r18dev_download_failed_msg: Download failed. Check logs for details.
settings_r18dev_use_desc: When enabled, the scraper consults the local dump before falling back to HTTP
settings_scrape_actress_global_desc: Default setting for actress scraping across all scrapers. Individual scrapers can override this in their settings.
settings_scraper_defaults_desc: Default settings applied to all scrapers unless overridden per-scraper
settings_scraper_defaults_referer_desc: Referer header for CDN compatibility (default: https://www.dmm.co.jp/)
settings_scraper_defaults_user_agent_des: Custom User-Agent for scraper requests (default browser UA if empty)
settings_scraper_desc: Enable/disable scrapers and configure user agent. Scraper priority is managed in Metadata Priority section.
settings_scraper_fetch_failed: Failed to fetch scrapers from API
settings_scraper_profile_desc: Only used when Proxy mode is "Use Scraper Profile".
settings_scraper_proxy_direct_desc: This scraper will bypass proxy and connect directly.
settings_scraper_proxy_disabled_warn: ⚠ Global proxy is disabled. This scraper will use Direct mode regardless of setting above.
settings_scraper_proxy_note: Global proxy must be enabled for scraper proxy settings to take effect. Each scraper can be set to Direct (bypass), Inherit (global default), or Specific (custom profile).
settings_scraper_proxy_routing_note: Global proxy must be enabled for these settings to apply.
settings_scraper_proxy_specific_desc: Uses the scraper-specific profile selected below.
settings_scraper_scrape_actress_warn: ⚠ Enable 'Scrape Actress Information' in global settings to use this option.
settings_scraper_use_browser_warn: ⚠ Enable 'Use Browser' in global settings to use this option.
settings_security_allow_unc_desc: Permit \\server\share paths. UNC paths can leak NTLM credentials; enable only with trusted servers.
settings_security_allowed_desc: Javinizer will only scan and operate inside these directories. With no allowed directories configured, all file operations are blocked.
settings_security_denied_desc: Paths here are always blocked, even if they fall under an allowed directory. Built-in system directories (/proc, /sys, /dev) are always denied.
settings_security_desc: Control which directories Javinizer can scan and write to. The first allowed directory is the default scan path. Changes are saved and hot-reloaded immediately.
settings_security_unc_already_list: Server already in the allow list
settings_server_desc: Configure API server host, port, and system paths
settings_server_latest_version_toast: You are on the latest version
settings_server_temp_dir_desc: Base directory for temporary files (default: data/temp). Cannot contain path traversal patterns.
settings_test_proxy_before_saving: Test all modified proxy profiles before saving
settings_token_warning: This token value will not be shown again. Copy it now.
settings_translation_apply_primary_desc: Replace primary movie fields with translated text
settings_translation_deepl_api_key_desc: DeepL API key (required for both free and pro API modes)
settings_translation_deepl_base_url_desc: Optional DeepL endpoint override (leave blank to use mode defaults)
settings_translation_deepl_click_refresh: Click Refresh to load usage data
settings_translation_deepl_mode_desc: Use free for DeepL API Free plan, or pro for paid DeepL API.
settings_translation_desc: Translate aggregated metadata to a target language using configurable providers
settings_translation_enable_desc: Translate metadata after aggregation and before saving to database
settings_translation_enable_thinking_des: Automatically maps to backend-specific reasoning controls for supported OpenAI-compatible engines like vLLM, Ollama, and llama.cpp
settings_translation_models_loaded: Loaded from {url}. You can still edit manually below.
settings_translation_openai_compatible_a: Not required for local endpoints like Ollama
settings_translation_openai_compatible_b: OpenAI-compatible API base URL (works with Ollama, vLLM, OpenRouter, and compatible services)
settings_translation_overwrite_target_de: Overwrite target-language translation entries already returned by scrapers
settings_translation_source_language_des: Source language code (use 'auto' when provider supports auto-detection)
settings_translation_target_language_des: Target language code for translated metadata
settings_translation_timeout_desc: Maximum time to wait for translation API calls
settings_word_replacement_enable_desc: De-censor and replace words in all text fields (title, description, genres, etc.) using database mappings. Default censored-to-clean pairs (e.g. S******n -> Shotacon) are seeded on startup.
settings_word_replacements_desc: Manage word uncensor rules applied during scraping
setup_credentials_sub: This becomes the master login for this Javinizer server. You can add more users later.
setup_directories_empty_hint: No directories added yet. Add one below to enable scanning, or skip and add later.
setup_directories_sub: Add the folders that hold your video files. Javinizer can only read and write inside these locations — add as many as you need.
setup_err_load_scrapers: Could not load available scrapers. You can configure them later in Settings → Scrapers.
setup_scrapers_none: No scrapers reported by the API.
setup_scrapers_none_hint: You can configure scrapers later in Settings → Scrapers.
setup_scrapers_none_selected: No scrapers selected — scraping will be unavailable until you enable some.
setup_scrapers_sub: Pick the scrapers Javinizer will query for metadata and arrange them by priority — higher means a source wins when fields conflict. You can fine-tune each scraper's options later in Settings.
setup_success_receipt_foot: Receipt issued locally · no data leaves this server
setup_success_sub: Credentials have been registered and your session is now active. Keep these details safe — you'll use them to sign in to Javinizer.
update_clipboard_failed: Could not copy to clipboard — select the command text manually
update_toast_checks_disabled: Update checks are disabled in configuration
video_not_supported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
viewer_aria_zoom_out: Click to zoom out or drag to pan
words_add_rule_heading: Add a new word replacement rule
words_both_fields_required: Both original and replacement fields are required
words_import_defaults_confirm: Import default word replacements too? Click OK to include defaults, Cancel to skip them.
words_next_scrape_note: Replacements take effect on the next scrape. Existing movies are not retroactively updated.
words_none_configured: No word replacements configured yet. Add one above.
words_subtitle: Manage word replacements for uncensoring metadata strings
